name: KB B-Stance Flow (@Asgooch)
description: A unilateral kettlebell flow: B-stance swing → swing clean → B-stance squat → snatch overhead → OH lunge. All same arm, don't put the bell down. 5 reps each side, 5 rounds. Builds coordination, conditioning, control, and strength.

exercises.notes: One foot back, heel up. Explosive hip drive.
Swing up to shoulder/rack — same arm
Hold at rack, B-stance squat — back foot heel up
From rack, snatch straight overhead — split stance
Bell locked out overhead, lunge forward — same side

tips: 5 reps each side per round — do all 5 exercises on one side, then switch
Don't put the bell down between exercises — it's a continuous flow
@Asgooch used a 24kg bell for all rounds
Focus on smooth transitions between movements
